scope.summary: The synthetic legacy-3DES wallet fixture decrypts through the server wallet posture path and is exercised by the D6 TCPS rig lane.
out_of_scope: Any live OCI wallet, customer identifier, host name, tenancy, or certificate material.
Changing the sibling rust-oracledb driver; the server consumes the pinned driver only.
Fixing the known B5 UnknownIssuer timeout behavior, which remains tracked separately.

entry_points.name: cargo test -p oraclemcp-core --test doctor_wallet_posture legacy_3des_p12_decrypts_through_the_server_wallet_path -- --nocapture
entry_points.trace: Passed on 2026-07-22 with CARGO_TARGET_DIR unset so Cargo used the checkout target/. The test reported 1 passed, 0 failed, proving the committed legacy_3des_p12/ewallet.p12 fixture reaches DoctorWalletPosture::PrimaryUsable through the server wallet posture path.

entry_points.name: cargo test -p oraclemcp-core --test doctor_wallet_posture the_legacy_3des_probe_actually_decrypts_rather_than_noticing_the_file -- --nocapture
entry_points.trace: Passed on 2026-07-22 with 1 passed, 0 failed. The wrong-password control proves the server path is decrypting the synthetic legacy-3DES PKCS#12 contents rather than accepting the fixture by filename or presence alone.

entry_points.name: bash scripts/rig/oracle_tcps_lane.sh run --log
entry_points.trace: Passed on 2026-07-22 after updating the stale P2-4 selector to the committed p2_4_wallet_profile_without_explicit_sni_reaches_local_tcps_terminator test. The lane reported synthetic_material_scan pass, B5 current-red signature observed, B6 SSL_CERT_FILE pass, B6 SSL_CERT_DIR pass, P2-4 pass, P-U4 legacy 3DES server wallet path pass, and scenario_complete pass.

entry_points.name: bash -n scripts/rig/oracle_tcps_lane.sh
entry_points.trace: Passed on 2026-07-22; the D6 TCPS rig lane shell entrypoint parses after the P2-4 selector update.

limitations: The proof uses only committed synthetic wallet fixtures under crates/oraclemcp-core/tests/fixtures/wallet.
The D6 lane intentionally treats the known B5 UnknownIssuer timeout as current-red evidence; that driver gap is outside this P-U4 server-path close.
The full workspace Cargo gate was not run because this shared checkout has unrelated in-flight panes.

known_defects.description: B5 UnknownIssuer still burns the 20s call-timeout budget; this was observed by the D6 lane and remains outside the P-U4 server-path scope.
